name: Region
description:
Region
The Unicode [Common Locale Data Repository (CLDR)](http://cldr.unicode.org/)
region code of the country or region of the address.
For example, the code for the United States is `US`.

For the full list of codes, refer to the [CLDR Chart](http://www.unicode.org/cldr/charts/30/supplemental/territory_information.html).
